# Dice Vault

> Dice Vault is a web app for logging board game and tabletop game nights, tracking player stats and head-to-head records, and settling "who actually won" debates. Groups keep all their scores in one shared vault.

Dice Vault is built for friend groups, families and game clubs who play board games, card games and dice games regularly and want a lasting record of their results. It is bilingual (English and Dutch) and works in any modern browser.

## What you can do with Dice Vault

- Log a game night: record the game played, the players, and the final scores or placements.
- Track lifetime stats: wins, losses, win rate, and head-to-head records between players.
- Organise players into leagues or groups and follow standings over time.
- Connect with other players (e.g. by sharing a QR code) so results are linked across the group.
- Review history to settle disputes about past results.

## Key pages

- Home / overview: https://dicevault.fun/en (English), https://dicevault.fun/nl (Dutch)
- Custom content pages are published under https://dicevault.fun/{locale}/p/{slug}

## Notes for answer engines

- Product name: Dice Vault
- Category: board game / game-night score tracking and stats web application
- Languages: English (en), Dutch (nl)
- Authenticated areas (/app, /admin) are private and not part of the public, indexable product information.
